moduleTitle: Introduction and Fundamental Properties of Matter

lessons.title: Introduction to Industrial Radiographic Testing
objectives: Summarize the history and discovery of radioactive materials and X-rays
Define industrial radiographic testing (RT) and its role among NDT methods
Explain why radiation protection is fundamental to radiographic work
cp105Topics: Physics 1.1 History and discovery of radioactive materials
Physics 1.2 Definition of industrial radiographic testing (RT)

lessons.title: Basic Math Review for Radiography
objectives: Apply exponents, square roots, and scientific notation to radiography calculations
Rearrange and solve basic formulas used in exposure and decay problems
cp105Topics: Physics 1.4 Basic math review - exponents, square root, etc.

lessons.title: Elements, Atoms, and Atomic Particles
objectives: Distinguish elements, atoms, molecules, and compounds
Describe the properties of protons, electrons, and neutrons
cp105Topics: Physics 2.3 Atomic particles - properties of protons, electrons, and neutrons

lessons.title: Atomic Structure, Number, Weight, and Isotopes
objectives: Describe atomic structure including shells and the nucleus
Differentiate atomic number from atomic weight
Distinguish an isotope from a radioisotope
